name: Mr. Unlucky Has No Choice but to Kiss!
original_name: 不幸くんはキスするしかない！
overview: Tensions sizzle when a student with horrible luck joins forces with another boy with chronic good luck in this charming romance based on a hit manga

trailers.title: Mr. Unlucky Has No Choice but to Kiss! | Official Trailer | The most unfortunate BL romance to date😅
